question_text:
Longest Common Prefix

Write a function to find the longest common prefix string amongst an array of strings. If there is no common prefix, return an empty string `""`.
input_format: Space-separated values as per problem arguments.
output_format: A single line representing the result.
explanation: We start by assuming the first string is the common prefix. We then refine this prefix by checking it against each subsequent string in the list, shortening it until it matches the start of the string. O(S) where S is the sum of all characters in all strings.
